nasb.text: For they cannot sleep unless they do evil; And they are robbed of sleep unless they make someone stumble.

esv.text: For they cannot sleep unless they have done wrong; they are robbed of sleep unless they have made someone stumble.

cnv.text: 因為他們不行惡，就不能入睡； 不使人跌倒，就要失眠。

ccb.text: 因为他们不作恶就无法入睡， 不绊倒人就无法安眠；

csbs.text: 要知道，这些人如果不作恶就睡不着觉， 不绊倒人就睡卧不安；
